Module 4: Internal Launches
!
Executive Summary
If you currently have a business or list, an Internal Launch is your sweet
spot - this is where you want to start. An internal launch is to your list only,
there are no affiliates or JV’s involved.
You’ll generally get bigger results here than a Seed Launch or Quick
Launch, because of the way you roll it out. It’s much simpler than a big JV
launch, as there aren’t other people involved and aspects you need to
worry about.
The work you put into an Internal Launch can be reused for your JV launch.
That’s why it’s great to do an Internal Launch first and get the data/proof.
Once you do that, you can share the results with your potential JV partners,
and you can assure them it’s been tested.
An Internal Launch is the bread and butter (heart and soul) of PLF. These
are elegant launches where you have maximum control and they happen
on your time frame.
It can happen whenever it’s convenient for your schedule vs. a JV launch
which has a lot of people involved and needs to be planned ahead of time.
!
!
!
